hero.title: COSUN Blog: Market, Engineering, and Compliance Updates
hero.description: Practical insights for B2B buyers in auto accessories. Read about market shifts, QC tactics, and compliance checklists.

posts.title: The Shift to USB-C PD in Automotive: What Wholesalers Need to Know
posts.excerpt: As EU mandates USB-C for consumer electronics, the automotive aftermarket is racing to catch up. Here is why high-wattage PD matters.

posts.title: Reducing Return Rates: Why Heat Dissipation Matters in Car Chargers
posts.excerpt: High return rates often stem from a single invisible factor: heat. Learn how material choice and circuit design impact longevity.

posts.title: EU RoHS vs. REACH: Compliance Checklist for Auto Accessories
posts.excerpt: Navigating European compliance can be tricky. We break down the essential documentation you need before importing into the EU.

posts.title: Packaging for Retail vs. E-commerce: A Cost Analysis
posts.excerpt: Retail boxes need to sell. E-commerce boxes need to survive. How to choose the right packaging strategy for your channel.

posts.title: 2025 Trend Report: Magnetic Mounts and MagSafe Ecosystems
posts.excerpt: The magnetic ecosystem is expanding beyond phones. See how new magnetic standards are influencing car mount designs.

posts.title: How to Choose the Right OEM Partner in China
